summary: SLA113 Iteration 19 testing complete. All NEW features working: 1) Fish Multiplayer Lobby CRUD - POST/GET/DELETE /api/sla113/fish/lobbies creates/lists/removes lobbies with player count and fish count, 2) Custom Slot Symbols CRUD - POST/GET/DELETE /api/sla113/slots/symbols creates themed symbol sets (e.g., Southern Lifestyle with LOWRIDER/SKULL/ROSE), DEFAULT set always included, 3) 5-Reel Video Slot template with WILD, SCATTER, Free Spins, 9 PAYLINES in game_templates.py, 4) FishMultiplayerPanel.jsx renders lobby browser with player name input, create lobby form, active arenas list with Join buttons, 5) SlotSymbolsPanel.jsx shows Classic and Southern Lifestyle sets with colored symbol tags, New Symbol Set button toggles editor with name/color/weight/payout fields. Backend: 13/13 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified.

issues: WebSocket connection closes before established - non-critical, metrics still load via REST

critical_code_review_comments: Fish Multiplayer Lobby uses in-memory _lobbies dict - lobbies persist only while server is running
WebSocket endpoint /api/sla113/fish/play/{lobby_id} handles player join, shoot, chat, cursor actions
Custom Slot Symbols stored in MongoDB sla113_slot_symbols collection with SYM-{uuid} IDs
DEFAULT symbol set (Classic) is hardcoded and always returned first in list, cannot be deleted
5-Reel Video Slot template (_video_slot_5reel_template) includes WILD, SCATTER, freeSpins, 9 PAYLINES, custom symbol support
FishMultiplayerPanel.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing (fish-player-name, fish-lobby-name, create-lobby-btn, etc.)
SlotSymbolsPanel.jsx has proper data-testid attributes (toggle-create-symbols, symbol-set-name, save-symbol-set, etc.)
All 4 partitions (FACTORY, EMPIRE 1, FOUNDRY, VAULT) navigate correctly with new nav items

test_credentials.note: No auth required for /sla113 - SLA113 dashboard is accessible without login

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed lobbies and symbol sets during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 Iteration 19 adds: 1) Fish Multiplayer Lobby - POST /api/sla113/fish/lobbies?name=X creates lobby, GET lists lobbies with player/fish count, DELETE removes lobby, WebSocket at /api/sla113/fish/play/{id} for real-time gameplay. 2) Custom Slot Symbols - POST /api/sla113/slots/symbols creates themed symbol sets (5-15 symbols with name/color/weight/payout), GET returns DEFAULT (Classic) + custom sets, DELETE removes custom sets. 3) 5-Reel Video Slot template replaces 3-reel for slot_machine game type - includes WILD, SCATTER, Free Spins, 9 PAYLINES, custom symbol support via GAME_CONFIG.custom_symbols. 4) FishMultiplayerPanel.jsx in FACTORY partition, SlotSymbolsPanel.jsx in EMPIRE 1 partition. Southern Lifestyle symbol set (SYM-5B9958) was pre-created.

backend_api.notes: Creates lobby with FISH-{uuid} ID, returns id/name/created_at
Creates symbol set with SYM-{uuid} ID, requires 5-15 symbols
Removes custom set, returns 400 for DEFAULT

frontend_ui.notes: Player name input, lobby name input, Create Arena button, Active Arenas list with Join buttons
Classic and Southern Lifestyle sets with colored symbol tags, New Symbol Set button toggles editor
Theme name input, 7 pre-populated symbol rows with name/color/weight/payout fields, Add Symbol button, Save button with min 5 validation
All 4 partitions (FACTORY, EMPIRE 1, FOUNDRY, VAULT) navigate correctly with new nav items

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real. Fish lobbies use in-memory storage. Slot symbols stored in MongoDB.
